# Narrative Protocol - LLMs.txt

## Overview
Narrative Protocol is a World State and Event Engine for defining versioned worlds, executing events (AI or direct), and recording verifiable execution history.

## Base URL
`https://api.narrativeprotocol.com`

## Authentication
- All `/api/*` endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.
- `/app/*` public execution routes use wallet signature validation (no API key).
- Missing/invalid API key returns `401`.

## Core Routes

### Health
- `GET /health`

### Worlds
- `GET /api/worlds?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds`
- `GET /api/worlds/:id`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:id`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:id`
- `POST /api/worlds/:id/publish`
- `POST /api/worlds/:id/unpublish`

### Entity Schemas and Attributes (World-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`

### Events and Versions (World-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/events?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions/:version/publish`

### Deployments (World-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/lock`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/history?page=1&limit=10`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/event-bindings`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/event-bindings`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`

### Public App Execution
- `POST /app/deployments/:address/execute`
- Body includes `eventId`, optional `input`, plus `wallet`, `signature`, `message`.
- If priced (`executionSettings.priceUsd > 0`), include `X-Payment` (x402).

### AI Models
- `GET /api/ai-models`

## Event Version Fields (Current)
- `inputSchema`
- `outputSchema`
- `readEntities`
- `stateChanges`
- `behaviorPrompt`
- `mutationSettings` (`mode: ai | direct`, `template` required for `direct`)
- `executionSettings` (`visibility: admin | public | cron`, optional `priceUsd`, optional `cron`)

## Migration Summary
- `reads` -> `readEntities`
- `stateChangeSchema` -> `stateChanges`
- `resultSchema` -> `outputSchema`
- `firstBinding` -> `bindings` (array, per-binding onchain config)

## Concurrent Execution Lock
Events use a mutex lock - an event cannot execute if another event is already running that reads or modifies the same entity schemas.

## Deployment Body
```json
{
  "name": "Season 1",
  "mode": "upgradable",
  "targetChains": ["near-testnet"],
  "aiModelId": "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  "isLLMPublic": false,
  "payToAddress": "6Q2...wallet",
  "bindings": [{
    "eventId": 29,
    "eventVersion": 1,
    "onchain": {
      "stateChanges": ["wins", "speed_rating"],
      "result": ["winner"]
    }
  }],
  "sourceDeploymentId": 12
}
```

## Quick Flow
1. Create world: `POST /api/worlds`
2. Create entity schema: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
3. Create event: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
4. Create deployment: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
5. Create instance: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`
6. Execute event: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`
